name: Detective Loupe Puzzle 2
author: Poki
description: Detective Loupe Puzzle 2 is the fun sequel where you join Detective Loupe on another quirky mystery adventure! Search through strange scenes, spot hidden objects, and solve silly logic puzzles full of unexpected twists and surprises. Every clue brings you closer to cracking the case. Got a clever mind? Jump into Detective Loupe Puzzle 2 and put your skills to the test! How to play Detective Loupe Puzzle 2 Click or tap to play! Who created Detective Loupe Puzzle 2 Detective Loupe Puzzle 2 is created by 10x10 Games. Play their other game on Poki: Wacky Doodle Fixes , Basket Swooshes , Free Kick Screamers , footy-zag and Detective Loupe Puzzle ! How can I play Detective Loupe Puzzle 2 for free? You can play Detective Loupe Puzzle 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Detective Loupe Puzzle 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Detective Loupe Puzzle 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
